word: G1514 - εἰρηνεύω - eirēneúō - i-rane-yoo'-o - Be at peace

sections.paragraph:
- Original: εἰρηνεύω

- Transliteration: Eireneuo

- Phonetic: i-rane-yoo'-o

- Definition:

1. to make peace

2. to cultivate or keep peace, harmony

3. to be at peace, live in peace

- Origin: from G1515

- TDNT entry: 08:57,2

- Part(s) of speech: Verb

- Strong's: From G1515; to be (act) peaceful: - be at (have live in) peace live peaceably.
